# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

brokers:
 0:
   listeners:
    plaintext:
      port: 9092
      config:
        advertisingHostInfo: "HOST_IP"
        jmx.endpoint.port: 1099
        jmx.initial.context.factory: org.apache.kafka.jmx.DefaultJmxEndpointFactory
        jmx.permissions.file: /dev/null
        jmx.server.authenticate: false
        jmx.server.login.context: ""

    kafka:
      ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm: none
      ssl.client.auth: none
      security.inter broker.protocol: plaintext
      port: 9092

metrics:
  listeners:
    9999:
      type: io.confluent.metrics.reporters.JmxReporter
      config:
        mbean.server.jvm.domain: org.apache.kafka.common
        enabled: true
        bind: 0.0.0.0
